title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. To initiate enrollment, log into the employee portal and navigate to the 'Benefits' section. Here, you will find detailed information about available health and dental plans, including coverage options and costs. If you are a new employee, you must complete your enrollment within 30 days of your start date. For assistance, you can contact the HR benefits team at benefits@company.com or call extension 1234. Changes to your enrollment can also be made during qualifying life events, such as marriage or the birth of a child, but must be reported within 30 days of the event. Make sure to review all plan details carefully to select the best options for you and your family.
